```{r paper-selected-locus-zoom, fig.width=7.52, fig.height=9.2}
      breaks = selected_l2_effect_breaks,
      labels = selected_l2_effect_break_labels,
      limits = selected_l2_effect_xlim,
      oob = scales::oob_squish
    ) +
    labs(
      title = column_title,
      subtitle = NULL,
      x = if (show_x_axis) expression("Conditional effect  " * E * "[" * b[j] * " | " * gamma[j] * " = 1]") else NULL,
      y = NULL
    ) +
    paper_panel_theme +
    theme(
      legend.position = if (show_legend) "bottom" else "none",
      plot.title = if (is.null(column_title)) element_blank() else element_text(
        face = "bold", size = 9, hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 4)
      ),
      plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = if (show_x_axis) element_text(size = 8.5) else element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = if (show_x_axis) element_text(size = 7, color = "grey25") else element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.x = if (show_x_axis) element_line(color = "grey35") else element_blank()
    )
}

paper_lollipop_l2_legend_plot <- function() {
  df <- tibble::tibble(
    fit_type = factor(
      c("Baseline", "SuSiNE ensemble", "Warm refit"),
      levels = c("Baseline", "SuSiNE ensemble", "Warm refit")
    ),
    x = c(0.07, 0.43, 0.07),
    y = c(0.68, 0.68, 0.30)
  )
  ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, color = fit_type)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.8) +
    geom_text(aes(label = fit_type), x = df$x + 0.055, hjust = 0,
              size = 2.55, color = "grey15") +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Baseline" = "#666666", "SuSiNE ensemble" = "#0B6E4F", "Warm refit" = "#C65D00"),
      guide = "none"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE, clip = "off") +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 4, 0, 4))
}

paper_highlight_l2_legend_plot <- function() {
  ggplot() +
    geom_point(
      aes(x = 0.10, y = 0.64),
      shape = 21,
      size = 4.0,
      stroke = 1.1,
      fill = NA,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    geom_label(
      aes(x = 0.10, y = 0.28, label = "0.42"),
      size = 2.5,
      label.size = 0.18,
      fill = "white",
      color = "black"
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      aes(x = 0.10, xend = 0.10, y = 0.39, yend = 0.53),
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.25
    ) +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0.25,
      y = 0.48,
      label = "circle: highest-weight setting\nnumber: aggregation weight",
      hjust = 0,
      size = 2.55,
      color = "grey15"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE, clip = "off") +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 4, 0, 4))
}

paper_sigma_l2_legend_plot <- function() {
  sigma_levels <- sort(unique(selected_l2_drift_tbl$sigma_0_2_scalar))
  sigma_labels <- format_grid_value(sigma_levels)
  sigma_cols <- scales::hue_pal()(length(sigma_levels))
  df <- tibble::tibble(
    sigma_label = sigma_labels,
    color = sigma_cols,
    col = rep(seq_len(4), length.out = length(sigma_levels)),
    row = rep(c(2, 1), each = 4, length.out = length(sigma_levels))
  ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      x = 0.21 + (.data$col - 1) * 0.18,
      xend = .data$x + 0.045,
      text_x = .data$xend + 0.018,
      y = 0.28 + (.data$row - 1) * 0.35
    )
  ggplot(df) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y, color = sigma_label),
                 linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(x = xend, y = y, color = sigma_label), size = 2.1) +
    geom_text(aes(x = text_x, y = y, label = sigma_label),
              hjust = 0, size = 2.45, color = "grey15") +
    scale_color_manual(values = stats::setNames(df$color, df$sigma_label), guide = "none") +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0.10,
      y = 0.50,
      label = expression(sigma[0]^2),
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 3.35,
      color = "grey15"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE, clip = "off") +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 4, 0, 4))
}

if (requireNamespace("patchwork", quietly = TRUE)) {
  zoom_panel_letters <- LETTERS[seq_len(2L * length(selected_zoom_loci))]
  selected_locus_zoom_rows <- purrr::map2(selected_zoom_loci, seq_along(selected_zoom_loci), function(loc, i) {
    show_legend <- i == length(selected_zoom_loci)
    left_letter <- zoom_panel_letters[[2L * i - 1L]]
    right_letter <- zoom_panel_letters[[2L * i]]
    paper_lollipop_plot(loc, left_letter, show_legend = show_legend) |
      paper_pip_drift_plot(loc, right_letter, show_legend = show_legend)
  })

  selected_locus_zoom_figure <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
    selected_locus_zoom_rows,
    ncol = 1
  ) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(heights = rep(1, length(selected_locus_zoom_rows))) &
    theme(
      plot.margin = margin(4.5, 4.5, 4.5, 4.5),
      panel.spacing.x = grid::unit(3.2, "mm"),
      panel.spacing.y = grid::unit(5.5, "mm")
    )

  # Column titles are now set as plot.title on the row-1 plots themselves
  # rather than as a separate header strip above. plot.title anchors to the
  # plot panel (data region), so titles auto-center over their column
  # regardless of how much width each plot's y-axis labels consume. This
  # replaces the previous per-header `x =` nudges, which were fragile and
  # had to be re-tuned whenever axis labels or panel widths changed.
  selected_locus_zoom_l2_rows <- purrr::map2(selected_zoom_l2_loci, seq_along(selected_zoom_l2_loci), function(loc, i) {
    show_x_axis <- i == length(selected_zoom_l2_loci)
    is_first_row <- i == 1L
    title_lollipop <- if (is_first_row) "PIPs for shifted effects" else NULL
    title_effect   <- if (is_first_row) "Fitted signal contribution" else NULL
    title_drift    <- if (is_first_row) "PIP L2 drift from baseline" else NULL
    (
        paper_locus_row_label_plot(loc) |
        paper_lollipop_l2_plot(loc, show_x_axis = show_x_axis, show_legend = FALSE,
                               column_title = title_lollipop) |
        paper_signal_contribution_l2_plot(loc, show_x_axis = show_x_axis, show_legend = FALSE,
                                          column_title = title_effect) |
        paper_pip_drift_l2_plot(loc, show_x_axis = show_x_axis, show_legend = FALSE,
                                column_title = title_drift)
    ) +
      patchwork::plot_layout(widths = c(0.07, 1, 1, 1))
  })

  selected_locus_zoom_l2_legend <- (
    paper_lollipop_l2_legend_plot() |
      paper_highlight_l2_legend_plot() |
      paper_sigma_l2_legend_plot()
  ) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(widths = c(1, 0.95, 1.35))

  # First row is a touch taller than the others to absorb the plot.title
  # vertical space without compressing its panel area below the other rows.
  selected_locus_zoom_l2_heights <- c(
    0.98,
    rep(0.90, length(selected_locus_zoom_l2_rows) - 1L),
    0.42
  )
  selected_locus_zoom_l2_figure <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
    c(selected_locus_zoom_l2_rows, list(selected_locus_zoom_l2_legend)),
    ncol = 1
  ) +
    patchwork::plot_layout(heights = selected_locus_zoom_l2_heights) &
    theme(
      plot.margin = margin(4.5, 4.5, 2.5, 4.5),
      panel.spacing.x = grid::unit(3.2, "mm"),
      panel.spacing.y = grid::unit(2.0, "mm")
    )

  ggsave(
    file.path(overall_figure_dir, "paper_selected_locus_zoom_lollipop_drift.png"),
    selected_locus_zoom_figure,
    width = 7.52,
    height = 9.2,
    dpi = 300,
    bg = "white",
    limitsize = FALSE
  )
  ggsave(
    file.path(overall_figure_dir, "paper_selected_locus_zoom_lollipop_drift.pdf"),
    selected_locus_zoom_figure,
    width = 7.52,
    height = 9.2,
    bg = "white",
    limitsize = FALSE
  )
  ggsave(
    file.path(overall_figure_dir, "paper_selected_locus_zoom_lollipop_l2_drift.png"),
    selected_locus_zoom_l2_figure,
    width = 7.52,
    height = 8.4,
    dpi = 300,
    bg = "white",
    limitsize = FALSE
  )
  ggsave(
    file.path(overall_figure_dir, "paper_selected_locus_zoom_lollipop_l2_drift.pdf"),
    selected_locus_zoom_l2_figure,
    width = 7.52,
    height = 8.4,
    bg = "white",
    limitsize = FALSE
  )

  list(
    jsd = selected_locus_zoom_figure,
    l2 = selected_locus_zoom_l2_figure
  )
} else {
  warning("patchwork is not installed; selected-locus zoom figure skipped.")
  invisible(NULL)
}
```

```{r free-locus-R-cache}
# The lollipop helpers cache per-locus R matrices (each ~ p^2 doubles, around
# 0.3-0.5 GB at p = 6-7k) in selected_locus_R_cache. Nothing downstream needs
# them, so evict before section 9 reloads its own bundles per locus.
rm(list = ls(envir = selected_locus_R_cache), envir = selected_locus_R_cache)
invisible(gc(full = TRUE))
```

# 9. Basin r² Drift From c = 0 (one panel per locus)

Drift metric: weighted (1 - r²) on max-weight 1-1 matched per-effect coefficient
vectors, weighted by `min(var_y_explained_a, var_y_explained_b)`. RSS analog of
`weighted_r2_drift` from `effect_matching_drift_analysis_5arm.Rmd`. Uses the
R-weighted cosine `(b_i' R b_j) / sqrt((b_i' R b_i)(b_j' R b_j))` since X is
not available in the SS regime.

```{r basin-r2-drift-compute, message=TRUE}
basin_r2_drift_tbl <- ensure_basin_r2_drift_tbl()
basin_r2_drift_tbl
```

```{r basin-r2-drift-plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
plot_basin_r2_drift <- function(loc) {
  df <- dplyr::filter(basin_r2_drift_tbl, .data$locus_id == loc)
  flag_row <- dataset_metrics_for_flag %>% dplyr::filter(.data$locus_id == loc)
  flagged <- isTRUE(nrow(flag_row) == 1L &&
                    isTRUE(flag_row$ld_z_inconsistency_flag[[1]]))
  ggplot(df, aes(x = c_value, y = basin_r2_drift,
                 color = factor(sigma_0_2_scalar))) +
    geom_line() +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    labs(
      title = paste0("Basin r² Drift From c = 0: ", loc,
                     if (flagged) "  [LD/z inconsistent]" else ""),
      subtitle = "Weighted (1 - r²) on matched per-effect b_l, R-weighted cosine",
      x = "Annotation scale c",
      y = "Weighted (1 - r²) drift",
      color = expression(sigma[0]^2)
    )
}

# Optional: pull the inconsistency flag from dataset_metrics if present so we
# can annotate flagged loci in the title.
dataset_metrics_path <- file.path(aggregated_dir, "dataset_metrics_full.csv")
dataset_metrics_for_flag <- if (file.exists(dataset_metrics_path)) {
  readr::read_csv(dataset_metrics_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  tibble::tibble(locus_id = character(), ld_z_inconsistency_flag = logical())
}

purrr::walk(sort(unique(basin_r2_drift_tbl$locus_id)), function(loc) {
  p <- plot_basin_r2_drift(loc)
  ggsave(
    file.path(locus_figure_dir, paste0(loc, "_basin_r2_drift.png")),
    p, width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 150
  )
  print(p)
})
```

# 10. Floored-Conditional Edge-Case Report

```{r floored-conditional-edge-case-report, message=TRUE}
# Reports any locus/fit/variant edge case that left a floored-conditional
# entry as NA. Kinds are documented above the floored_conditional_log helper.
# Prints "No edge cases encountered." when everything went cleanly.
report_floored_conditional_diagnostics()
```
